name: ExtensionSubscriptionStatus_Type
title: R5: handshake | heartbeat | event-notification | query-status | query-event (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubscriptionStatus.type` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubscriptionStatus.type` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SubscriptionStatus.type` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.type` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.type` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: handshake | heartbeat | event-notification | query-status | query-event (new)

element.isModifierReason: Not known why this is labelled a modifier

element.definition: The type of event being conveyed with this notification.

binding.description: The type of notification represented by the status message.
